scripts.qa:admin: cd admin && npx vitest run && npx vite build
scripts.qa:client: cd apps/clients && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
scripts.qa:mobile: cd mobile && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
scripts.qa:functions: cd functions && node -e "require('./index.js'); console.log('Functions load OK')"
scripts.qa:platform: pnpm qa:types && pnpm qa:admin && pnpm qa:client && pnpm qa:mobile && pnpm qa:functions && echo '✅ All QA gates passed'
